4047.issue: [S4047] Adapter "comfoairq" is not yet available in the stable repository. Please consider adding it.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.comfoairq/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
